basic_details.job_title: NeGD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Delivery Manager, AI/ML Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: National e-Governance Division (NeGD) has released the official Various Positions Notification 2026 on 2026 at negd.gov.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under the NeGD Various Positions Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 55 years with a qualification of Graduate (Minimum) can apply online from 2026 to 26 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Head of Engineering & Chief Architect: 12-15 years of experience in Engineering & Chief Architect roles. AI / ML Lead: 8-12 years of experience in AI/ML. Delivery Manager – Apps & Releases: 8-12 years of experience in Delivery Management. Service Delivery & Change Manager: 7-10 years of experience in Service Delivery & Change Management. Product Manager: 5-7 years of experience in Product Management. Finance & Compliance Manager: 6-10 years of experience in Finance & Compliance. AI/ML Engineer: 5-8 years of experience in AI/ML Engineering. QA Lead: 6-8 years of experience in QA Leadership.

selection_process: Screening of applications will be based on qualifications
and relevant experience. Only shortlisted candidates shall be invited for interviews.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NeGD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of online applications for the NeGD Various Positions Recruitment 2026 is 26th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for various positions in the National e-Governance Division (NeGD) recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for NeGD posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a graduate degree. However, specific qualifications and experience vary significantly for each post, as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to NeGD posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under this NeGD recruitment is 55 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NeGD Various Positions Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official portal to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the positions in NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The annual budget for salaries ranges from Rs. 32,81,580 to Rs. 46,43,027 per year, depending on the specific post and the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no mention of an application fee in the official notification for the NeGD Various Positions Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications based on qualifications, age, and relevant experience. Only shortlisted candidates will be invited for interviews.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is offered by NeGD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The positions advertised under NeGD Recruitment 2026 are on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of NeGD for more details.
